productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex ST Patch Black Backpacks
description: The heritage line of adidas, the adidas originals, brings to you this fabulous retro-casual blend bag. With colourful pouches on the front and a copiously spacious main compartment, this bag exudes casual style and comfort making for a great buy.Made of 100% polyester for durability and easy maintenanceMain zippered compartment with a heavily padded laptop slot and padded sleeve with lots of organiser spaceFour zippered compartments on the outer in white, blue, red and yellowPrinted branding on the blue compartmentMeshed and ergonomically padded back for sweat-free comfortAdjustable padded shoulder straps for carrying easeCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
